overview.short: Sandor is a census town falling within the Vasai (Bassein) municipality of the Palghar district (previously Taana district), in the Konkan division of Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Sandor is a census town falling within the Vasai (Bassein) municipality of the Palghar district (previously Taana district), in the Konkan division of Maharashtra, India. Sandoris, the natives of Sandor, are predominantly Roman Catholic Kshatriyas of the Christian Bombay East Indian community, they converted in the colony centred around Bassein, the richest possession of the former Portuguese East Indies with the capital at Velha Goa, in the southern edge of the Konkan region. howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Diocese of Vasai
topPlaces.description: The Roman Catholic Diocese of Vasai (Latin: Vasaien(sis)) is a diocese located in the city of Vasai in the ecclesiastical province of Bombay in India.

topPlaces.name: Manickpur
topPlaces.description: Manickpur is a small village in the Vasai (Bassein) township of the Palghar district in the Maharashtra, India.

topPlaces.name: Vadavali
topPlaces.description: Vadavali is a village in the Palghar district of Maharashtra, India. It is located in the Talasari taluka.

topPlaces.name: Fort Vasai
topPlaces.description: Fort Vasai (Vasai killa in Marathi, Fort Vasai in English) is a ruined fort in the town of Vasai (Bassein), Konkan Division, Maharashtra, India. The structure was formally christened as the Fort of St.

topPlaces.name: Naigaon
topPlaces.description: Naigaon is a village in Palghar district of Indian State of Maharashtra. It is linked by the Versova Bridge /Ghodbunder Bridge to Navghar, which is connected from the east side of the settlement by the National Highway.

topPlaces.name: Kalamb Beach
topPlaces.description: Kalamb Beach is a long, isolated beach located in Nala Sopara, near Ahmedabad highway, Nala Sopara, near Nirmal, India.

topPlaces.name: Dongri Fort
topPlaces.description: The Dongri Fort, or the Dongri Hill Fort, locally known as the Janjire Dhavari Fort, is a fort in Mumbai, India. It is located in the Dongri area.

topPlaces.name: Gokhivare
topPlaces.description: Gokhivare is a census town in Vasai-Virar taluka of Palghar district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Until recently when Palghar district was formed on 1 August 2014, Gokhivare came under the original Thane district.

Vadavali is a village in the Palghar district of Maharashtra, India. It is located in the Talasari taluka.

Fort Vasai (Vasai killa in Marathi, Fort Vasai in English) is a ruined fort in the town of Vasai (Bassein), Konkan Division, Maharashtra, India. The structure was formally christened as the Fort of St.

Naigaon is a village in Palghar district of Indian State of Maharashtra. It is linked by the Versova Bridge /Ghodbunder Bridge to Navghar, which is connected from the east side of the settlement by the National Highway.
Kalamb Beach is a long, isolated beach located in Nala Sopara, near Ahmedabad highway, Nala Sopara, near Nirmal, India.
The Dongri Fort, or the Dongri Hill Fort, locally known as the Janjire Dhavari Fort, is a fort in Mumbai, India. It is located in the Dongri area.

Gokhivare is a census town in Vasai-Virar taluka of Palghar district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Until recently when Palghar district was formed on 1 August 2014, Gokhivare came under the original Thane district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sandor?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sandor is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (31 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (37 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sandor?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sandor at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sandor?
faq.a: Stays in Sandor start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sandor?
faq.a: The top attractions are Diocese of Vasai, Manickpur, Vadavali, Fort Vasai, Naigaon.
